reviews.comment:
Demoré un dos minutos en sacar el vehículo de la bomba porque estaba con una persona no vidente y el operario, no me pidió, me dijo que lo corra e hizo colocar otro vehículo atrás cuando la isla de al lado estaba vacía. Poco cordial el trato

(Translated by Google)
It took me about two minutes to get the vehicle out of the pump because I was with a blind person, and the attendant didn't ask me to move it; he just told me to move it and made another vehicle park behind it even though the pump island next to it was empty. The service was very unfriendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10539008023529743134/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlNWFiRFFnEAE
